recommendations.title: Landmine Goes Click
recommendations.overview: After an American tourist steps on a landmine, he is forced to watch his girlfriend get assaulted.

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.

recommendations.title: Killer Heat
recommendations.overview: An expat PI is hired to investigate a suspicious death in Crete, Greece, where jealousies run deep amongst the victim's powerful family.

recommendations.title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie
recommendations.overview: Monk steps out of retirement as his stepdaughter's wedding turns tragic when her fiancé dies in a bungee jumping accident.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Erased
recommendations.overview: A former agent of the CIA and his estranged daughter go on the run after his employers target them for assassination.

recommendations.title: Ordinary People
recommendations.overview: A gym teacher and his female student look for her missing friend. But as they investigate, they find that her disappearance is a part of a larger conspiracy.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
recommendations.overview: A tourist witnesses a murder and finds herself caught up in a series of bloody killings.

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: Stranger on the Third Floor
recommendations.overview: Newspaper reporter Michael Ward plunges into a nightmare of guilt, fearing that his "evidence" has sentenced the wrong man to death.
